original: a prophylactic designed to repel gabilani

A tubular aerosol canister with the outline of a gabilani on it. Once sprayed on, it should detract any gabilani from approaching you for a time. It doesn’t feel particularly full; you suspect you’ll only get one use out of it.
You take out the aerosol canister and spray yourself all over with it. It doesn’t smell of anything but wet solvent... but then, you aren’t a goblin.

context: <<POS:06692805>> <<VARS:var0=e.capitalA,var1=e.short>> output(e.capitalA+e.short+" seems uninterested in the spray.")
